note: 20 targeted SOL-xhigh slots for packet 065/005. Thread 1 (1-5) fan-out automation; thread 2 (6-15) recommendation deep-dive; thread 3 (16-20) general effectiveness + AI-council. Seeded from 001's 216-repo registry.

slots.angle_label: Per-leaf CLI flag + model + live-tool parametrization
slots.directive: How do production multi-agent/fan-out frameworks let each parallel leaf carry its OWN CLI flags, model id, reasoning effort, and live-tool (web-search) enablement? Find concrete config schemas and spawn code (per-branch argv construction, tool-permission-per-branch). Goal: a design for how system-deep-loop's fanout-run.cjs could pass codex's top-level --search + per-lineage model/effort per leaf, which it currently cannot.

Find frameworks/patterns that fan out across DIFFERENT models per branch (model-router-per-branch, mixture-of-agents, heterogeneous ensembles) with real spawn/scheduler code. How do they schedule N models x M branches, and reconcile differing output contracts? Map to system-deep-loop's fan-out so one run can mix LUNA/SOL/GLM leaves like the manual 001 run did.

slots.angle_label: Cross-iteration shared state for parallel research leaves
slots.directive: Manual 001 seeded each iteration with the growing registry (sequential). How do PARALLEL research fan-out systems share a growing dedup/novelty registry across concurrently-running leaves without races (append-only logs, CRDT/merge, optimistic concurrency, per-leaf shards + merge)? Find real implementations. Map to runtime/state-jsonl-checkpointing + dedup-novelty.

Study resumable/event-sourced fan-out execution: partial-failure salvage, re-run only failed leaves, deterministic merge of multi-leaf outputs. Compare to system-deep-loop's fanout-salvage.cjs / fanout-merge.cjs / fanout-pool.cjs concerns. Find repos with robust fan-out salvage + merge and extract the mechanism.

slots.angle_label: Bias-free reduction of heterogeneous multi-model leaves
slots.directive: When leaves come from different models, how do you MERGE/reduce without model-preference bias or dedup that silently drops a minority model's finding? Find aggregation/dedup/ranking methods for heterogeneous agent outputs (semantic dedup, provenance-preserving merge, per-model calibration). Also: propose the concrete design + a minimal prototype shape for an automated multi-model + --search fan-out loop that reproduces the manual 001 run.

Deepen R1. Find concrete implementations of multi-signal loop termination: stuck/oscillation detectors, novelty+quality+execution fused stop gates, path-covering bounds spanning retries/handoffs/tool re-entry. Reference code (OpenHands stuck-detector, others), algorithms, thresholds. Give an actionable design for runtime/convergence.

Deepen R2. Concrete durable-execution receipt/idempotency mechanisms: per-event replay semantics (reuse/re-execute/compensate), idempotency keys, replay-compatibility fingerprints, journal versioning. Look at Temporal/Restate/DBOS internals + LangGraph checkpoint replay. Actionable design for runtime/state-jsonl-checkpointing.

Deepen R3. How to MEASURE effective judge independence (correlation of errors, marginal info gain, effective-vote-count estimators) and how to separate generator/detector/orchestrator/scorer/target roles. Find implementations + papers with concrete metrics. Actionable design for deep-ai-council + deep-alignment.

Deepen R4. Concrete conditional fan-in (skip-on-agreement, widen-on-disagreement), logical-branch-ID determinism, partial-failure policies (strict/quorum/deadline/progressive). Find scheduler/reducer code. Actionable design for runtime/fan-out-fan-in.

Deepen R5. Eval-DAG cascades (cheap deterministic checks short-circuit before expensive judges), weighted-threshold promotion, regression-gated self-repair (every fix proven by re-run). Look at promptfoo, OpenCompass CascadeEvaluator, oss-fuzz. Actionable design for deep-review + deep-improvement.

Deepen R6. Semantic-community coverage/novelty (GraphRAG Leiden), contradiction-as-versioned-event (Graphiti validity windows), append-then-resolve (mem0). Concrete algorithms + data models for a novelty gauge that drives divergent broadening. Actionable design for runtime/dedup-novelty + continuity-threading.

slots.angle_label: R7 incremental stream-fold gauges + immutable observability
slots.directive: Deepen R7. Incremental O(delta) stream-fold gauges (RisingWave-style), immutable execution records with judgments attached later (langfuse), semantic+side-effect telemetry planes. Concrete gauge implementations. Actionable design for runtime/gauges-observability.

Deepen R8. Hierarchical resource-typed budgets, centralized pre-call enforcement, rolling windows, soft/hard exhaustion as an explicit state transition, parent-child aggregation. Look at pydantic-ai, litellm, s1. Actionable design for runtime/budget-cost.

slots.angle_label: Open gap: RL convergence theory to loop termination
slots.directive: Investigate the 001 open question: does any work formally connect RL convergence theory (regret bounds, sample complexity, best-arm identification, optimal stopping) to LLM agent-loop termination? Find the closest work and assess whether a principled stopping rule is derivable. Map to runtime/convergence; flag as possible original contribution.

slots.angle_label: Open gap: durable-execution guarantees under LLM nondeterminism
slots.directive: Investigate the 001 open question: which durable-execution guarantees (Temporal-style determinism, exactly-once) survive LLM-step nondeterminism, and which break? Find analyses/implementations handling nondeterministic steps in replay. Actionable guidance for runtime/state-jsonl-checkpointing + locks-recovery.

slots.angle_label: 2025-2026 SOTA techniques for more-effective agent loops
slots.directive: What are the newest (2025-2026) techniques for making agentic/iterative loops more effective that 001 did NOT catalogue? Look for recent papers/repos on loop control, adaptive compute, test-time scaling, verification loops, self-consistency, process reward models. Extract concrete, adoptable mechanisms + recommendations for system-deep-loop.

Deepen the AI-council findings (operator flagged these as most valuable). Adjudication protocols beyond majority vote (bayesian aggregation, debate with judge, weak-to-strong, constitutional adjudication); mitigating bandwagon/verbosity/position bias. Find concrete protocols + evidence. Recommendations for deep-ai-council.

slots.angle_label: AI-council depth: calibration, diversity, seat selection
slots.directive: Deepen AI-council: judge calibration methods, diversity/independence metrics, and seat-selection-as-experimental-design (info-gain-per-cost, active judge selection). Find implementations + metrics. Concrete recommendations for how deep-ai-council should choose and weight seats.

slots.angle_label: Loop failure taxonomy + degeneration vs convergence
slots.directive: When do agent/self-improvement loops DEGENERATE (mode collapse, reward hacking, drift, sycophancy amplification) vs converge? Find taxonomies of loop failure modes + detection signals + guardrails. Map to observability gauges + convergence. Recommendations to make current deep loops fail safe.

Final synthesis-oriented iteration. Across all three threads, identify the highest-leverage NEW recommendations for system-deep-loop that emerged in THIS run (beyond 001's 8). Prioritize by impact x effort. Surface any remaining gaps. Return a strong recommendations[] set and sharp next_angles for a future phase.
